title: codereview: AnnounceMessage class docstring omits current_channel
description: Attributes list in docstring (lines ~47-64) does not list current_channel despite it being a core field for CCP-9. P2 docs. Add description: current_channel: Preferred RX channel for rendezvous (0-15). Matches Rust/C structs. Tagged codereview.
close_reason: Updated AnnounceMessage class docstring in python/src/lichen/announce/messages.py to explicitly document current_channel field and its role in signed_data() for CCP-9. Performed 3 mandatory codereview passes, filed 3 codereview beads (P3/P4 style only). No P0-P2 issues found after convergence. Tests in test_cross_impl_interop.py and test_topology_scenarios.py implicitly cover via AnnounceMessage usage.
